title: Iran’s missiles pierce Israel’s defenses, raising doubts about interceptors
summary_full: Concern that Iran was amassing missiles to overwhelm defenses was a key factor in the push for war, officials said, and recent strikes laid bare Israel’s vulnerability.
summary_public: Concern that Iran was amassing missiles to overwhelm defenses was a key factor in the push for war, officials said, and recent strikes laid bare Israel’s vulnerability.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Iran’s missiles pierce Israel’s defenses, raising doubts about interceptors
